label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 14

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL attacked from a 24-rider breakaway with BARDET, dropped him inside 4km, won solo by over a minute to reclaim mountains jersey after Tourmalet collapse.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL dominated every breakaway incarnation day after collapse, revealing exceptional recovery capacity rare at grand tour level.
AYUSO repeatedly marked by KUSS teammates on descents, preventing GC reshuffling despite willingness to attack on transitional stage.
BARDET paced EVENEPOEL in breakaway despite not being teammate, suggesting tactical alliance for stage hunting over GC defense.
STORER isolated in chase group behind main break, losing mountains jersey by not making front selection despite starting as favorite.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Extreme recovery from Tourmalet collapse to animate all moves and win solo suggests GC crisis may have been tactical/psychological reset.
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: neutral: Worked with EVENEPOEL in break but dropped inside 4km, showing domestique-quality support rather than winning form.
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: Repeatedly attempted to attack on descents despite being marked, showing ambition for top-five move on transitional terrain.
rider_signals.STORER Michael: negative: Caught in chase group and lost mountains jersey despite starting as favorite, revealing poor breakaway positioning instincts.
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: Team marked AYUSO attacks protecting overall positions, confirming Jumbo's defensive posture with podium lockout established.
